arrival.text: If your parking pass says to scan it at the gate, please do. Otherwise, take a ticket at the gate to enter then go inside the hotel lobby to validate your reservation with a staff member.
Park in any open space not marked as "Reserved".
After securing your vehicle & belongings, head to the shuttle pick up area and board the shuttle to San Francisco Airport.

departure.text:
Upon your return to SFO, board the shuttle in the designated area back to the hotel. 

Pick-ups are at the Departures Level at each terminal (Hotel Courtesy Shuttle Bus Stop). On-call shuttles are available by request between 1:00 AM - 3:30 AM by calling the hotel directly at 650-443-5500 when you are ready for pick up.
If you scanned your parking reservation to enter, you may scan it again when exiting. If you pulled a ticket to enter, please see a hotel staff member for validation & exit instructions.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: The Westin SF Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1 Old Bayshore Hwy. This is the The Westin SF Airport - Uncovered Self Park lot. It is located on the South  side of Old Bayshore Hwy. between E Millbrae Ave. and Cowan Rd.
restrictions: Parkers are welcome to stop inside and visit the on-site Starbucks coffee shop!
The shuttle runs every 15 minutes from 4:00 AM–12:30 AM, and upon request outside these hours.

departure.text: Pick-ups are at the Departures Level at each terminal (Hotel Courtesy Shuttle Bus Stop). On-call shuttles are available by request between 1:00 AM - 3:30 AM by calling the hotel directly at 650-443-5500 when you are ready for pick up.

common.title: Aloft Hotel San Francisco Airport - Uncovered Self Park

After parking, please ensure you stop by the front desk to present your SpotHero parking pass, either printed or on mobile device and confirm with front desk where you parked. Fill out the hotel parking form.
Shuttle service is no longer available at this location. You must request your own transportation to SFO via taxi/rideshare.

departure.text: Shuttle service is no longer available at this location. You must request your own transportation back to the facility to retrieve your vehicle via taxi/rideshare.

arrival.text: Guests are required to come into the lobby to check-in, get parking permit, sign waiver and leave keys. Place parking permit on dashboard.

Once parked, please head to the hotel entrance to board the shuttle. The shuttle runs every 45 minutes from 4am-12pm and 3pm-11pm. Customers arriving or returning outside of that time must secure their own transportation. Customers may also use the SamsTrans bus #292 for an additional fee.

departure.text: When you return to SFO, please gather your luggage and wait to board the shuttle. If returning outside of shuttle availability, take the #292 back to the hotel.
You may then pick up your vehicle and go.

departure.text:
After gathering your luggage, head to the departures floor. Exit the terminal and cross the street to the middle island for airport shuttle pickup.

Ensure you board the black shuttle for Embassy Suites Oyster Point.
Upon Return, pull your car up to the exit gate and insert the validated ticket to exit.

Gather your belongings and head to the front desk to catch the shuttle.

departure.text: Upon arriving back at SFO gather your luggage and call the hotel at 650-347-2381 to request a shuttle.

Head to the Departures level and proceed to the "Hotel Shuttle" area. Look for a black shuttle marked Crowne Plaza and Holiday Inn Express South.

IMPORTANT: Please ask the shuttle driver to confirm that the shuttle is for Burlingame, as there is another Holiday Inn Express "North" shuttle in a different area.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
YOU MUST PARK IN P4 WEST (GREEN LEVEL) past the GREEN delineators. Failure to do so may result in citation and/or tow.

Secure your vehicle and use the WEST elevator to level 0 to the designated pickup/rideshare area to meet your ride. There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

Shuttles are not for the public and DO NOT go to SFO.

departure.text: When you return to the airport you will need to arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi! There is no shuttle service from the airport.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

Show your reservation and mention code PARK20 to receive 20% off your bill.
https://www.theanecdote.com/

This location has a vehicle height restriction of 7'.

arrival.text: Show your digital or printed parking pass to the front desk to validate your parking.
The front desk will provide you with a parking pass, which you must place on your car dashboard. Front desk staff will direct you to the designated parking area.
Board the shuttle to the airport. Shuttle runs from 5am - 12am.

departure.text: Upon your return, gather your luggage, head to the departures floor and head to the “Hotel Shuttles” area. Note: At the international terminal, follow signs to the departures floor, exit the building, and head to “Zone 12” and “Hotel Courtesy Shuttles”.

The shuttle runs on a loop, so no need to call the front desk, but if you would like to inquire about timing, you may call the front desk at (650) 871-4100. Make sure you are boarding a white shuttle that says “Sonesta Select” & Doubletree & “Travelodge” DO NOT board the shuttle “Sonesta ES Suites”.
When back at the hotel, simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Sonesta Select San Francisco Airport Oyster Point Waterfront - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1300 Veterans Blvd. This is the Sonesta Select San Francisco Airport Oyster Point Waterfront lot, operated by Sonesta International Hotels Corporation. It is located on the Northeast side of Veterans Blvd. between Oyster Point Blvd. and the end of Veterans Blvd.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

items.full_description: This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Stop by the front desk to show the SpotHero reservation. They will direct you where to park.
Once parked, request a rideshare service to the airport.

departure.text: Once you return to the airport, gather your luggage and request a rideshare service back to the hotel.
When you return to your vehicle, you are free to go!

common.title: Sonesta ES Suites San Francisco Airport Oyster Point Waterfront - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1350 Veterans Blvd. This is the Sonesta ES Suites. It is on the east side of Veteran’s Blvd. after passing the Sonesta Select Hotel.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text:
Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
Please Note: For all reservation changes, please allow 15 minutes for updates to take effect.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved" and wait in the lot to board the shuttle to San Francisco International Airport (SFO).

departure.text: From the airport, each terminal has a pick-up location for the shuttle. The shuttle runs on a 30 minutes continuous loop between the hours of 4:00 am and Midnight. There is no need to call for a pickup. Follow the signage in the airport terminal directing you to the Hotel Shuttle pick up location (Departure Level, Center Island, Hotel Courtesy Booth). Look for a large black vehicle with Hilton San Francisco Bayfront and Burlingame Airport Parking logo on its side. Shuttle service is NOT available between midnight and 4am.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights. The gate will open, and you're free to go!

common.title: Burlingame Airport Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 620 Airport Blvd. This is the parking lot for the Hilton San Francisco Airport Hotel, and it is operated by Burlingame Airport Parking. It is located on the north side of Airport Blvd. between Bay View Pl. and Anza Blvd. The entrance is marked by a blue and white 'Airport Parking' sign with red lettering.
restrictions: From 4:00 AM  to 12:00 AM (midnight), the shuttle service operates on a half-hourly basis. There is no need to call to request service during this time. For airport pickup, simply wait on the departures level, center island at the hotel shuttles sign. Look for the black shuttle marked with Hilton San Francisco Airport Bayfront/Burlingame Airport Parking. Shuttle service is currently not available between Midnight and 4 AM.

From the airport, each terminal has a pick-up location for the shuttle. The shuttle runs on a 30 minutes continuous loop between the hours of 4:00 am and Midnight. There is no need to call for a pickup. Follow the signage in the airport terminal directing you to the Hotel Shuttle pick up location (Departure Level, Center Island, Hotel Courtesy Booth). Look for a large black vehicle with Hilton San Francisco Bayfront and Burlingame Airport Parking logo on its side.
Height restriction: 6' 8"
Please note: While this lot is affiliated with the Hilton Hotel, you will enter this lot at 620 Airport Blvd. Please reference the attached photos to ensure you enter the correct location.
Shuttle service is NOT available between midnight and 4am.

arrival.text:
Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.

You will also need to go to the front desk to obtain a parking permit.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

departure.text: When you return to the airport you will need to arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi! There is no shuttle service from the airport.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Holiday Inn & Suites San Mateo SFO - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 330 N Bayshore Blvd. This is the Holiday Inn & Suites San Mateo SFO - Uncovered Self Park lot, operated by Towne Park. It is located on the North side of N Bayshore Blvd. between Dore Ave. and Rogell Ave.

arrival.text: When you arrive, show the front desk receptionist your SpotHero reservation and you will be directed where to park. Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
There is no shuttle service to/from the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

departure.text: Upon your return to SFO, collect your belongings and request your taxi/rideshare back to the Geneva Motel.
Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: Geneva Motel SFO - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3233 Geneva Ave. This is the Geneva Motel - SFO Uncovered Self Park Lot, operated by Geneva Motel. It is located on the North side of Geneva Ave. between Bayshore Blvd. and Talbert St.

The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.

arrival.text: Once you arrive at the hotel, proceed to the Front Desk/Lobby and show your SpotHero reservation, your ID, and vehicle information. You will need to sign the hotel's parking policy before parking vehicle. Please note that your ID may be scanned and documented to help the hotel identify and verify the parker.
You will be directed to a designed parking space.
Shuttle service to the airport is not provided. Arranging rideshare or taxi transportaion is the customer's responsibility.

departure.text: No shuttle service is provided. Customer is responsible for arranging transportation back to the hotel.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Alpine Inn & Suites - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 560 Carter Street, Daly City, CA, on the southeast side of Carter St. between Geneva Ave. and Saddleback Dr.
restrictions: All parking on Alpine Inn property is assigned. All SpotHero customers are required to come to the hotel front desk with their ID and vehicle information and must sign the hotel parking agreement in order to receive their parking assignment and permit. Failure to do so may result in your vehicle being towed.
Please Note Prior to Booking: This listing has a 21-day max reservation. Reservations cannot exceed 21 days.
